2373720.name: Mix the Forgotten
2373720.description:
You play as a silent protagonist who helps out everyone he cans, while transitioning into a new plane of existence. Mix the Forgotten is a narrative puzzle crafting adventure about making friends in a world where everyone and everything is strangely created in the image of man made things.



From a Judge's Hammer that seems to have gone mad to a depressed giant Rubber Duck, Mix is a surreal trip through five thematic zones. Your goal is to befriend anyone you can with the power of crafting, as even conversations have you doing handiwork to create responses and transforming words to convey correctly your intentions to the other objects around.



Mix the Forgotten offers players with a unique crafting system that is always in the world and does not have a need for complex special menus, just throw stuff together in your mixer and you will instantly see if the ingredients and their distribution can actually get you a new tool.



But tools are not the only thing you combine in this game, words are extremely powerful in this world, forget subtitles, this game has supertitles, you can actually interact with words and make them a reality.
2373720.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
